title: I'm Going to Travel
description: GOING TO for plans and intentions. The easier half of the future, and usually the right one for A1.2.
summary_pt_br: GOING TO + verbo base para planos já decididos e previsões com evidência. Estrutura: am/is/are + going to + verbo. 'I'm going to study tonight.' Super comum em conversa real.

scenes.text_en:
'I'M GOING TO STUDY tonight,' Bia said.
'Rafa IS GOING TO OPEN a food truck in Orlando.'
'Joca IS GOING TO START a new job.'
'WE ARE GOING TO HAVE a party.'
GOING TO = already decided.
scenes.text_pt:
'VOU ESTUDAR hoje à noite,' disse a Bia.
'O Rafa VAI ABRIR um food truck em Orlando.'
'O Joca VAI COMEÇAR um emprego novo.'
'VAMOS TER uma festa.'
GOING TO = já decidido.

scenes.title: The formula
scenes.body_en: Subject + am/is/are + GOING TO + BASE verb. 'I am going to leave.' 'She is going to study.' 'They are going to travel.' Contractions: I'm / she's / we're going to. In casual speech, often 'gonna': 'I'm gonna leave.' (understood in writing but write full form).
scenes.body_pt: Sujeito + am/is/are + going to + verbo base. Contrações: I'm / she's / we're. Na fala: 'gonna' (informal, não escreva).

exercise.question: Complete: 'She ___ ___ ___ to Italy.' (going to + travel, with 'is')

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "I'm Going to Travel". GOING TO for plans and intentions. The easier half of the future, and usually the right one for A1.2. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "I'm Going to Travel". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'I'm Going to Travel'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "I'm Going to Travel".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
